issues.description: First effect structure is incorrect. 'TrashFromHand' should be a condition (optional cost), not an action. The Rest action should be conditional on trashing a card.
TrashFromHand as action is invalid; should be a condition. Use 'condition' with 'type' for optional trash cost.
Second effect trigger 'Trigger' is invalid. There should be only one OnPlay effect with conditional trash. Resting opponent's rested Leader should be part of the OnPlay effect.
Target 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incorrect for preventing Leader attack. Target should be 'OpponentLeader' and effect must include duration preventing attacks until end of opponent's next turn.
Missing duration. Text 'cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next turn' requires duration:'UntilEndOfOpponentNextTurn' or equivalent effect preventing attacks during that window.
Card text requires 'Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Leader' - implies targeting only if a rested Leader exists. Condition filtering for rested status missing.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Leader cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next turn.
